indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: Wood flooring can be slippery and may pose a tripping hazard when wet.

indicators.name: toilet
indicators.rationale: Toilet is not suitable for extended computer work due to hygiene concerns and lack of privacy.

indicators.name: bidet
indicators.rationale: Bidet is not suitable for extended computer work due to hygiene concerns and lack of privacy.

indicators.name: vase
indicators.rationale: Vase is a decorative element that does not contribute to the functionality of the space for computer work.

indicators.name: window-blind
indicators.rationale: Window blinds can obstruct natural light and create shadows, affecting visibility and mood.

indicators.name: closed door
indicators.rationale: Closed door provides some privacy, but it is not a dedicated workspace.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While there is a closed door for some privacy, the presence of a toilet and bidet, wood flooring, and window blinds make the space less than ideal for extended computer work. The lack of a dedicated workspace and ergonomic seating further undermines the suitability.
